category_title: Children who speak unintelligibly due to severe phonological impairments
scenario_title: Spontaneous toy-based conversation in therapy room
minimal_context: The student and tutor are in the therapy room having a spontaneous conversation about the toys present.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here are the toys we can play with today. What should we do with the blocks and cars?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Dah wuh bee gah. (Speaks a 4-word unintelligible utterance confidently, without using any gestures)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Dah wuh bee gah. (Repeats the exact same verbal message, believing the words are coming out just as intended)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I still don't understand what you mean.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Dah wuh bee gah! (Repeats the verbal message again, but this time emphasizes the content words by pointing directly at the car and showing where it should go)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here are the toys we can play with today. What should we do with the blocks and cars?

STUDENT: Dah wuh bee gah. (Speaks a 4-word unintelligible utterance confidently, without using any gestures)

TUTOR: What did you say?

STUDENT: Dah wuh bee gah. (Repeats the exact same verbal message, believing the words are coming out just as intended)

TUTOR: I still don't understand what you mean.

STUDENT: Dah wuh bee gah! (Repeats the verbal message again, but this time emphasizes the content words by pointing directly at the car and showing where it should go)
